raw.message: 本格ポーカーが楽しめるアプリで中毒者続出

hook.summary: High-energy introduction of anime characters and the game title.
hook.visual_action: Cards featuring anime characters flip onto the screen as the game logo appears with a bright flash.
hook.text_overlay: 勝ち上がれ 究極のマインドスポーツ！
hook.voiceover_transcript: 勝ち上がれ、究極のマインドスポーツ！エムホールデム！

scene_flow: Dynamic intro with character cards and the game title 'M HOLD'EM'.
Showcase of anime character art emphasizing the Texas Hold'em gameplay.
Brief look at the online multiplayer interface and game board.
Final character ensemble shot with the game logo and 'Now Available' text.
on_screen_text: 勝ち上がれ 究極のマインドスポーツ！
初心者も本格派も楽しめる
テキサスホールデムが無料で遊べる！
全国のプレイヤーとオンライン対戦可能！
audience_proxy: Japanese anime fans interested in competitive mind sports and online poker.
